title: Darwinia virescens
taxonomy: Darwinia virescens is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is native to Western Australia. Darwinia virescens belongs to the genus Darwinia, which is a group of flowering plants. The classification of Darwinia virescens is as follows: kingdom: Plantae, clade: Angiosperms, clade: Eudicots, clade: Myrtidae, order: Myrtales, family: Myrtaceae, genus: Darwinia, species: D. virescens. Further research and classification may be subject to revision.
